name: agentpay
description: Economic-intelligence layer for AI agents: budget-capped crypto/data tools with verifiable receipts, plus verified_route — a buyer-side x402 trust oracle. 17 free tools, no API keys, no wallet.
long_description: AgentPay gives an AI agent priced, capped, receipted access to live crypto and market-data tools over the x402 protocol. 17 tools are free out of the box (no API keys, no wallet, no USDC). It also exposes verified_route, a keyless buyer-side trust preview that vets the x402 marketplace (sweeps listings, collapses sybil/factory clusters, ranks by real usage) and names the real, used provider for a need — with the full paid version settled through the agentpay-x402 SDK. Free tools run with an ephemeral identity; no private keys ever leave the user's machine.

tools.name: verified_route
tools.description: Buyer-side x402 trust oracle: 'I need X, budget $Y — which tool is real?' Vets the marketplace, collapses sybils, returns the real, used provider.

tools.name: estimate_plan
tools.description: Price a multi-tool plan before spending (per-step cost, total, fits-budget verdict).

tools.name: market_snapshot
tools.description: Macro + crypto in one call: rates, S&P, BTC, ETH, gas.

tools.name: funding_rates
tools.description: Perp funding rates across Binance, Bybit, OKX.
